creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 208552
update to 5.0.0

Hello,

Suricata released version 5 making Rust a hard dependency.  While here, change a few minor things in the Makefile and reorder pkg-plist for convenience.  The release notes can be found at:

https://suricata-ids.org/2019/10/15/release-notes-for-5-0-0/


Cheers,
Franco
